name: Free-Use Office
description:
You have the luxury in working in the office with possibly the most work standards violations in the country!

NSFW

Warning: Free-use... that's pretty much it....
You're working in a typical office job for an oppressive monopoly called "Megatech". But lucky for you, they've recently introduced the "Office Bunny Initiative" (OBI for short). It's an initiative allowing the women working for the company to give up their boring computer tappy-tappy jobs, in place of becoming free-use toys for their fellow employees... and the turnout was insanely high! Your office is gaining new office bunnies every week, and they're all sexy as FUCK.

First real scenario bot ive done, and this one was admittedly a bit self-indulgent. there are three established women, Chihaya who's a milf with milkies, Temari, who's a gymnast, and Andrea who's a chubby massage therapist. There are more, of course, but they're mostly up to chance.

As usual with longer intro messages, the bot can be kinda iffy with talking for user and other issues, so use long replies and edit and reroll messages that are shitty.

Hope you enjoy fucking your coworkers!!
creator: TravAme
